mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_weather ( district_code, base_date, temp_max, temp_min, weather_code, sunrise, sunset, sunshine_duration, daylight_duration, prec_sum, snow_sum, radiation_sum, day_offset ) VALUES
(#{item.districtCode}, #{item.baseDate}, #{item.tempMax}, #{item.tempMin}, #{item.weatherCode}, #{item.sunrise}, #{item.sunset}, #{item.sunshineDuration}, #{item.daylightDuration}, #{item.precSum}, #{item.snowSum}, #{item.radiationSum}, #{item.dayOffset})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE temp_max = VALUES(temp_max), temp_min = VALUES(temp_min), weather_code = VALUES(weather_code), sunrise = VALUES(sunrise), sunset = VALUES(sunset), sunshine_duration = VALUES(sunshine_duration), daylight_duration = VALUES(daylight_duration), prec_sum = VALUES(prec_sum), snow_sum = VALUES(snow_sum), radiation_sum = VALUES(radiation_sum), updated_at = NOW()
